name: Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb. Italian sausage (may add less sausage)
1/2 c. dry bread crumbs (packaged Italian crumbs are good)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients until well blended.
2. Shape the mixture into medium-sized balls.
3. Place the meatballs in a spaghetti sauce that has been simmering for 30 minutes.
4. Alternatively, you can brown the meatballs first by placing them in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 25 minutes.
5. Let the meatballs simmer in the sauce for 30 minutes or until they are cooked through. The longer they simmer in the sauce, the better they will taste.
